items.title: Backpack US appoints former SEC Acting Chairman Piwowar to board amid push for crypto perps
items.whyYouShouldCare: The appointment of Piwowar could enhance regulatory clarity for crypto derivatives, potentially increasing institutional interest in Solana-based products.

items.title: New York positions itself as the blueprint regulator for GENIUS-era stablecoins
items.whyYouShouldCare: New York's regulatory framework for stablecoins may attract more projects to Solana, boosting liquidity and ecosystem development.

items.title: Securitize CEO says tokenized stocks could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tokenized stocks could significantly expand the crypto market, presenting new opportunities for Solana to integrate traditional assets into its ecosystem.
